Sustainable Cities and Communities.reasoning: The explicit weekly topic "非營利組織與社區" (NPO and community) and mention of "草根組織" (grassroots organizations) directly link to participatory community planning and management (Target 11.3).

Climate Action.reasoning: The explicit weekly topic "非營利組織與環境保護" (NPO and environmental protection) provides a strong, direct link to climate action, including mitigation, adaptation, and awareness (Targets 13.2, 13.3).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reasoning: The course's core focus on the Third Sector, civil society organizations, their relationship with government, and their role in public policy directly aligns with building effective, accountable, and inclusive institutions (Targets 16.6, 16.7).
